name: Performapal Classikuriboh
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>クラシックリボー
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack, this card is destroyed.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card is destroyed by its own Pendulum Effect: End the Battle Phase. You can only use each of the following effects of "Performapal Classikuriboh" once per turn. You can discard this card, then target 1 card in your Pendulum Zone; its Pendulum Scale becomes 1 until the end of this turn. When you take battle damage while this card is in your GY: You can place this card in your Pendulum Zone.
pend_eff: When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack, this card is destroyed.

You can discard this card, then target 1 card in your Pendulum Zone; its Pendulum Scale becomes 1 until the end of this turn.
